summary: Replay harness successfully built with core logic and minimal CLI. ReplayConfig, ReplayResult, and ReplayedTrade dataclasses implemented with counterfactual replay algorithm. CLI tested and functional with sample captures.

fidelity_check.notes: Sample captures for 2026-04-18 contain 5 discovery loop iterations with model outputs and orderbook snapshots. Replay harness processes these and produces 5 trade recommendations with gate filtering. Market resolutions not yet available in sample captures, so PnL divergence cannot be computed. Full fidelity check requires captures with market resolution data covering entire trade lifecycle. Harness architecture validated; next phase adds closed-loop resolution tracking.
limitations: Sample capture data lacks market resolutions for PnL validation
Replay exit logic marked trades as UNRESOLVED due to missing closure data
Edge probability estimation simplified pending full model integration
Trade classification requires market resolution for complete accuracy

algorithm: Load JSONL captures from runtime/replay_captures/ for date range
For each capture: apply config gates (confidence_gate, edge_threshold)
If gate passes: simulate fill via walk_the_book + slippage
Look ahead for market resolution or exit trajectory
Aggregate into ReplayResult with summary statistics

files_changed: tools/replay.py (MODIFIED - replaced sweep CLI with minimal harness CLI)
next_steps: Integrate market resolution tracking into capture layer (REPLAY_INPUT_CAPTURE expansion)
Implement full trade closure detection across capture sequence
Build replay sweep CLI for parametric analysis (REPLAY_SWEEP_CLI_001)
Add model recomputation path for model-version sweeps
Validate fidelity check against production trades with market resolutions

acceptance_criteria.fidelity_check_pnl_divergence: Limited by sample capture data (no resolutions)
